questionHtml:
A football player kicks a stationary ball of mass 0.45 kg towards a wall. The initial speed of the ball after the kick is 19 m s−1 and the ball does not rotate. Air resistance is negligible and there is no wind.

The player kicks the ball again. It rolls along the ground without sliding with a horizontal velocity of 1.40 m s−1. The radius of the ball is 0.11 m. Calculate the angular velocity of the ball. State an appropriate SI unit for your answer.
markschemeHtml:
13 «rad» s-1✓


Unit must be seen for mark

Accept Hz

Accept 4 π «rad» s-1
